title: Jump from header CTA to Techniques section
description: Verifies a first-time visitor can open the homepage, see the header content, and use the CTA to jump to the Techniques section successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Click the primary call-to-action link in the header
Verify the Techniques section is in view

title: Header core content is visible on initial load
description: Verifies the homepage header shows the core branding/title/subtitle content on initial load.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the site branding is displayed
Verify a page title and subtitle are displayed in the header

title: Technique cards show key content (image and text) consistently
description: Verifies technique cards display their core content consistently, including a visible image area and readable title/description.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Scroll to the Techniques section
Verify multiple technique cards are displayed with an image area and text content

title: Techniques section is reachable by scrolling without using CTA
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll down and reach the Techniques section without relying on the header CTA.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Scroll down until the Techniques section is reached
Verify the Techniques section is displayed

title: Keyboard user can reach and activate CTA with visible focus
description: Verifies a keyboard-only user can tab to the header CTA with visible focus and activate it to reach the Techniques section.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Press Tab until the primary call-to-action link is focused
Verify the focused element has a visible focus indicator
Press Enter
Verify the Techniques section is in view

title: All technique cards are reviewable by scrolling through the section
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll through the Techniques section to view the full list of technique cards without layout breakage.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Scroll to the Techniques section
Scroll through the Techniques section to the end of the card list
Verify the last technique card is visible and the layout remains readable

title: Small viewport layout keeps technique cards readable without clipping
description: Verifies on a small-screen viewport the Techniques cards remain readable and are not clipped or overlapping.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Resize the browser to a small mobile viewport
Scroll to the Techniques section
Verify technique card text is readable and cards are not visually overlapping or clipped

title: Landscape mobile viewport keeps header and cards usable
description: Verifies on a landscape mobile viewport the header and technique cards remain usable without content overlap or unreadable text.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Resize the browser to a small viewport and then switch to a landscape aspect ratio
Verify the header content remains readable without overlapping
Scroll to the Techniques section
Verify technique cards remain readable without overlapping or clipping

title: CTA anchor remains usable after scrolling back to top
description: Verifies the visitor can scroll away and still use the header CTA to navigate back to the Techniques section reliably.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Wait for the page to finish loading
Scroll to the Techniques section
Scroll back to the top of the page
Click the primary call-to-action link in the header
Verify the Techniques section is in view
